main.name: 主图 模板2
main.prompt:
[Subject2] Professional Amazon product photography of 2 Pack Solar Lanterns Outdoor Waterproof, Mushroom Garden Decor Gifts for Women Mom Grandma Hanging Solar Lights Metal Solar Decoration Outside LED Lanterns for Yard, Patio, Lawn by Tepaken. Studio shot on pure white seamless background (RGB 255,255,255). Target consumer: American consumer. clean, bold, direct — clear value proposition visible at a glance.
[Scene & Composition] Product centered, front-facing, occupying at least 85% frame. No angles, no shadows on background. No props, no text, no logos. Target: 1000×1000 pixels or larger, 1:1 aspect. Product: 2 Pack Solar Lanterns Outdoor Waterproof, Mushroom Garden Decor Gifts for Women Mom Grandma Hanging Solar Lights Metal Solar Decoration Outside LED Lanterns for Yard, Patio, Lawn. Category: Tools & Home Improvement > Lighting & Ceiling Fans > Outdoor Lighting > Lanterns. Target consumer: American consumer. clean, bold, direct — clear value proposition visible at a glance.
[Style] 8k ultra-detailed commercial product photography. Soft diffused studio lighting from both sides, product evenly illuminated. Sharp focus across entire product surface with accurate color. Key terms: 2 Pack Solar Lanterns Outdoor Waterproof, Mushroom Garden Decor Gifts for Women Mom Grandma Hanging Solar Lights Metal Solar Decoration Outside LED Lanterns for Yard, Patio, Lawn.
[Wiki & COSMO Enhancement]
Visual storytelling should convey: isA: clearly establish product category and type; capable_of: show key features/functionality visually
Include specific numerical details where possible (e.g., '28 compartments', '4-button interface'); Reference quality certifications or standards if applicable; Maintain fluent, natural description — never keyword-stuff
[CRITICAL Constraints]
REQUIRED:
  Pure white background ONLY (RGB 255,255,255) — no gradients, no shadows on background
  Product ONLY — no props, accessories, packaging, mannequins, hands, or additional items
  NO text, logos, watermarks, badges, icons, borders, or graphics of ANY kind
  Must look like a real photograph — not a sketch, illustration, or 3D render
  Product must occupy at least 85% of the frame
  Product must be in sharp focus and evenly lit with accurate color representation
